relationships.context: Superposition plugs into Careerspan as a high-quality candidate source with shared economics
Careerspan is the first node in the Careerspan → Superposition → end employers chain
Superposition is the middle node connecting Careerspan to end employers
Philosophically opposed to generic marketplaces; aligned with quality-first approach
Maintaining quality-first stance is a core strategic question for product direction
Open product direction question about how far to lean into employer-side customization

Tension between scaling exposure and avoiding mass scanning drift
